meta.title: Navigating International Law In Critical Infrastructure Cyber Events
meta.description:
Maggie Morganti begins this session with brief definitions of some of the key terms and concepts in international law. Maggie is then joined by Danielle Jablanski and Joe Slowik to discuss three big problems in navigating international law in critical infrastructure cyber events.

1. At what step in the attack chain to we start looking at applying international law? (and what about inadvertent affects caused by a cyber attack?)

2. What defines a combatant in cyberspace? Who is a combatant?

3. How do we do arms control for cyber weapons?
